title: Extend apps/e2e with commerce-owner flows + seed fixtures
note: Realigned 2026-06-21: apps/e2e (hospeda-e2e) is an existing mature harness — scope changed from 'create harness in apps/web' to 'extend apps/e2e with commerce-owner flows + fix seed gaps'.
